free_text: Details of counter telesc., no data
Protons and deuterons from Al-27 bombarded by 14.8 MeV
Aluminium foil of diameter 2.9 cm and
Associated alpha particle method for incoming neutron.
Energy spectra and angular distribution of proton (or
deuteron) were measured with a counter telescope.
specifically to allow measurements at backward angles.
Absolute. Recoil alpha counting for neutron-flux.
